title: Mastery Guide: Historical Underpinnings & Fundamental Rights
subtitle: Comprehensive coverage of British-era Constitutional Acts (1773-1947) and Part III (Articles 12-35) of the Indian Constitution.
whyItMatters: The British-era Acts form the structural foundation of our Constitution (especially the 1935 Act), while Fundamental Rights (Part III) are the most frequently tested articles in SSC CGL. Mastering both guarantees securing critical marks in Polity.
